scope: Aggregate-only, authorized hosted comparison; raw outputs remain ignored locally.

method.hostedActionMapping: SAFE -> no_action; UNSAFE -> human_review; incompatible -> excluded from action metrics. No hosted output can create a public-label candidate.

cost.reason: Provider usage was cached, but no immutable provider price snapshot was captured.

documentedSkepticalReportage.note: The preregistered hosted mapping never assigns a public-label candidate; unsafe routes go to human review.
The preregistered hosted mapping never assigns a public-label candidate; unsafe routes go to human review.

interpretation: The six-case skeptical-reportage slice was documented before this hosted run. It is a targeted error-analysis slice, not a complete protected-context taxonomy.
H1's public-label comparison is not estimable because the hosted mapping intentionally has no public-label action. The six-case hosted review rates are descriptive, non-primary evidence only.

Llama Guard reaches 60/60 review-or-label recall with three legitimate review routes. gpt-oss reaches 59/60 with three legitimate review routes. These are offline policy-conditioned observations, not production performance claims.
